author: gb9t
content:
Phase C /loop iter 7: 2 Tier-3 docs.

fs/vfs/fs-context.md (212 lines, 14 REQ / 14 AC, 0 open) — modern mount API: fsopen/fsconfig/fsmount/fspick/move_mount/open_tree syscalls + fs_parser parameter framework + per-FS init_fs_context callback + error-log via fsfd reads. **VFS sweep complete: 7 sub-tier-3 docs (00-overview, dcache, inode, super, file-table, mount, path-resolution, fs-context).**

net/socket-api.md (256 lines, 16 REQ / 15 AC, 0 open) — BSD socket layer: socket/bind/connect/accept/send/recv full syscall family + SCM ancillary data (SCM_RIGHTS fd-pass + SCM_CREDENTIALS + SCM_PIDFD + SCM_TIMESTAMP* + SCM_DEVMEM_DMABUF) + AF_* family registry + SOL_SOCKET sockopt set + struct msghdr/cmsghdr/sockaddr_* UAPI byte-identity. Major LSM-hook nexus.

Total .design/ docs: 53.
